title: Interaction Capability
description:
Refers to ease of use and user experience when interacting with the system. A good system is intuitive, accessible, and easy to learn.
[ul]
[b]Recognizable appropriateness[/b]: user understands if the system meets their needs.
[b]Learnability[/b]: ease of learning to use.
[b]Operability[/b]: ease of operation and control.
[b]User error protection[/b]: prevents or reduces errors.
[b]User engagement[/b]: attractive and motivating interface.
[b]Inclusiveness[/b]: accessible to different user profiles.
[b]User assistance[/b]: provides support and help.
[b]Self‑descriptiveness[/b]: intuitive use without external instructions.[/ul]
